name: Scotch Eggs
recipeInstructions:
1. Shell the eggs.
2. Wrap each egg evenly with about 4 ounces of sausage meat.
3. Fry at a moderate temperature until brown on all sides.
4. Drain on paper towels.
5. Chill in the refrigerator.
6. When ready to serve, line a platter with lettuce and arrange the Scotch Eggs, cut in half, among the lettuce.
Mrs William McG. Harlow
